profile: Highly disciplined and self-taught shadow operative with over a decade of elite combat experience. Former Kinkou Order member turned independent rogue, specializing in high-value target elimination, stealth infiltration, and Shuriman-Ionian combat arts. Known for operating alone, adapting fast, and never missing a mark.
objective: Seeking a covert operations role where my mastery of kama combat, shroud deployment, and five-point strike techniques can be fully utilized — without a council telling me what to do.
hobbies: Graffiti Art, Rap Battles, Kama Training, Shroud Crafting, Parkour

education.desc: Intensive training under Shen and Kennen. Curriculum covered energy manipulation, stealth movement, target acquisition, and Ionian combat philosophy.
Graduated top of class. Specialized in dual-kama techniques, five-point strikes, and shroud deployment under pressure.

work.title: Shadow Operative (Rogue)
work.desc: Operating independently across Ionia, Noxus, and Piltover. Executed 300+ covert contracts with a 100% success rate. Developed proprietary smoke shroud for field concealment. No failures. No witnesses.

work.title: Fist of Shadow
work.desc: Served as the Order's chief enforcer. Responsible for eliminating threats to the spirit realm balance. Left due to irreconcilable differences with leadership direction and outdated doctrines.

projects.title: Project: Smoke & Daggers
projects.desc: Developed a next-gen personal smoke shroud capable of concealing an operative for up to 8 seconds mid-combat. Field-tested in 47 live engagements.

projects.title: Five-Point Strike Protocol
projects.desc: Designed a lethal five-hit combo sequence targeting vital energy points. Now the gold standard for Ionian close-quarters combat.

certifications.title: Certified Shadow Operative — Rank S
certifications.desc: Issued by the Ionian Combat Council after field evaluation.

certifications.title: Kinkou Fist of Shadow Badge
certifications.desc: Awarded upon completion of the Kinkou Order's highest combat tier.

awards.name: Most Feared Operative — Ionia
awards.desc: Awarded for eliminating 12 high-value targets in a single quarter without detection.

trainings.title: Advanced Shroud Deployment Seminar
trainings.desc: Covered next-gen concealment techniques and energy-based field disruption.
